name: Adapter Parity
description: The same Campfire workflow is executed through the Codex and Claude adapters and compared for state semantics rather than model quality.
objective: Measure whether adapter surfaces preserve the same Campfire lifecycle, stop conditions, and durable-state expectations.
success_criteria: Both adapter paths preserve the same milestone and slice semantics.
Both adapter paths stop for the same class of reasons instead of drifting into adapter-specific behavior.
Any behavioral differences are recorded as adapter drift, not mistaken for task-quality differences.
